CaseInformation.CaseTitle: LAURA ALCARAZ, ET AL. VS LOS ANGELES COUNTY METROPOLITAN TRANSPORTATION AUTHORITY
CaseInformation.CaseType: Motor Vehicle - PI / Property Damage / Wrongful Death

Parties.name: Los Angeles County Metropolitan Transportation Authority

KeyCourtRuling.summary: Motion to compel deposition granted; sanctions denied due to medical hardship; deposition ordered.

DocumentsSummary.note: Full document list provided in source input is extensive and preserved conceptually.

ProceedingsSummary.pattern: Repeated discovery motions, continuances, OSC re dismissal, trial settings from 2021–2026

contact.name: Los Angeles County Metropolitan Transportation Authority
contact.address: One Gateway Plaza, Los Angeles, CA 90012
21051 Warner Center Ln, Ste 210, Woodland Hills, CA 91367-6597

ProceduralSummary.OverallPattern: Extended civil PI litigation with repeated discovery disputes, trial continuances, settlement/dismissal cycles, and post-2024 motions affecting case status.
KeyPhases: 2020–2021: Filing, initial discovery, subpoenas, early motion practice
2021–2023: Intensive discovery disputes and deposition litigation
2023–2024: Trial settings, motions in limine, bifurcation, settlement notice
2024–2025: Dismissal filings, OSC re dismissal, counsel withdrawal motions

TentativeRuling_2023_03_27.motion: Motion to Compel Deposition of Plaintiff

ruling.order: Plaintiff ordered to appear for deposition on March 28, 2023 or mutually agreed date within 30 days

court_reasoning_summary.discovery_history: Deposition noticed multiple times over ~2 years without completion
court_reasoning_summary.non_appearance: Repeated failures to appear or proceed with deposition
court_reasoning_summary.plaintiff_position: Health complications including major surgery and amputation-related recovery
court_reasoning_summary.court_balancing: Court found sanctions unjust due to medical hardship but required deposition to proceed

legal_effect.case_posture: Active discovery enforcement stage as of March 2023
Active discovery enforcement stage as of March 2023
